title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Luffy, Tama as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'm busy right now. I'm trying to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Pinch this kid's cheek off!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It hurts!! It hurts!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please forgive me!! I'll give ya back your baboon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Please stop...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you... men- toned the Kouzuki family earlier, didn't you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You shouldn't cling to the dead.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 20 years ago... the Kouzuki family was planning to destroy this country.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They were nothing but a family of evil!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I think I'm gonna die, Captain....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: didn't I tell you not to eat the fish from the river!? Why would you do that... at a time like this...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He'll have a straw hat around his neck!! Don't lay a hand on him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You're no match for him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'm heading that way now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What is that... thing?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I wonder... What could this be?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Strain

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Move, you shrimp!! Kiku's actions are unforgiv- able!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She rejected the honour of marrying and obeying a Samural. She completely insulted me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: STRAIN...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going to crack her skull open to set an example for others!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Man, you're so loud! I already told you that you can do whatever you want!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Nuaggh! Hhhh!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But... you won't be able to beat me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What'd you say!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I am...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I am this country's number one...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The man who will be the pirate king.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Giant...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: TSUPPARI...!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: UWO OOOOO OHHHH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yoko- ZunAA AAA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Urashima was blown away!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've gotta be joking...!! He shouldn't have lost to such a little shrimp!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: UWAAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: He's...!! He's that magistrate murderer!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Ah... He's zerojuro!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So what.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: gyaa aah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me he's also part of that group!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With that strong female swordsman and the Sumo wires- Tling little shrimp...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What is up with these guys!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey!! Call the boss of this town over here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We came here to take TAMA BACK!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: UWAAAH!! They're dangerous!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: They're rebels...!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 46 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
